hells_gate_details.fallback_scan: search for B8 XX XX 00 00 pattern in first 32 bytes

description: Hell's Gate technique for dynamic syscall number resolution. RC4-encrypted payload (key: 'H3llsG@t3_Sysc@ll'). Parses ntdll.dll syscall stubs looking for the 4C 8B D1 B8 signature (mov r10, rcx; mov eax, <ssn>) to extract syscall numbers, with fallback scanning for B8 XX XX 00 00 pattern. Anti-hooking integrity check verifies stubs haven't been hooked (checking for E9 JMP). Resolves 7 syscall numbers. Synthetic/safe — executes decrypted payload via CreateThread (real Hell's Gate would use direct syscall, but resolution is demonstrated).
